content:
# Session 51 (iter-051) — Review

## Metadata
- Target file: `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjInverse.lean` (TERMINAL, SOLO, mode `prove`).
- Sorry count: **6 → 6** (count unchanged; the engine sorry was relocated/reduced, not eliminated).
- Build: `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjInverse` → **EXIT 0** (8324 jobs), re-verified this review.
- 6 `declaration uses sorry` warnings: L438 (`sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`, NEW), L690 (S2), L715 (S3),
  L740 (S4a), L756 (S4b), L828 (`trivialisation_restrict_compat`).
- Primary target = B1-crux `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` (was sorry @ iter-050 L493).

## Headline — B1-crux engine `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` CLOSED at body level
- `H1inv` body is now **sorry-free** (NOT in the `uses sorry` warning list; re-verified) — a complete
  term-mode proof. It transitively rides the new helper `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (still 1 sorry), so
  `#print axioms H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` = `{propext, sorryAx, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`.
  This is the iter-049/050 localization pattern repeated: an opaque crux → genuine body + one named,
  far-reduced residual helper. Net sorry count flat, but real structural advance with a precise blocker.
- The crux was correctly re-characterised: it is the **`forget`-transport of the SHEAF-level
  `unit_leftAdjointUniq` triangle** for `restrictFunctorIsoPullback` — NOT the B2-style conjugate
  telescope the prior plan hypothesised. Decomposed into 4 named parts (the directive's prescribed
  effort-break):
  - **(I)** `hadj.unit.app M.val = forget ((restrictAdjunction f).unit.app M)` — `rfl` (both are
    `pushforwardPushforwardAdj`, the presheaf adj is the `forget`-image of the sheaf adj).
  - **(II)** sheaf Mathlib `Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app` ⇒ `restrictAdj.unit = pullbackAdj.unit ≫ ρ⁻¹`
    (`hII2`, term-mode).
  - **(III)** NEW helper `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` — the genuine sheafification-boundary content (PARTIAL, see below).
  - **(IV)** `forget ∘ (pushforward f).map = (pushforward φ').map ∘ forget` — `rfl`.
  - Assembled I→II→IV→III + `Functor.map_comp`/`Category.assoc`, **all term-mode** (`Eq.trans`/`congrArg`/`:=`).

## The new residual `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` (L438) — PARTIAL, reduced to ONE explicit mate identity
- Statement: `forget (sheaf pullbackPushforward unit) = presheaf-pullback unit ≫ (pushforward φ').map (η ≫ forget pbv)`.
- Forward progress that compiles before the sorry: transposed across the presheaf pullback adjunction
  (`Adjunction.eq_unit_comp_map_iff` — the clean transposer), unfolded `pullbackValIso`, applied
  `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`, exposing ONE fully-explicit `leftAdjointUniq` mate
  identity (documented in-code L459–474).
- **Named blocker:** the *abstract* sheaf pullback unit `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f` is built by
  `Adjunction.ofIsRightAdjoint`, hence **opaque to `simp`/`aesop`/`aesop_cat`** (normalises `forget _.map`
  → `.val` but cannot close — not formal). It must be related to the *concrete*
  `SheafOfModules.PullbackConstruction.adjunction φ` (whose `homEquiv` = `sheafAdj_X ∘ pullbackAdj_pre ∘ forget`)
  via `Scheme.Modules.pullbackIso φ = leftAdjointUniq (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f) (PullbackConstruction.adjunction φ)`
  + the `unit_leftAdjointUniq`/`leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit` family — ~80–150 LOC, the SAME mate
  calculus as root `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta`/`pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`.

## Attempts (from attempts_raw.jsonl: 18 code_change, 8 goal_state, 11 diagnostics, 2 lemma_search)
- The diagnostics trace confirms the documented dead-ends were hit and routed around: repeated
  `rw [Category.assoc]` / `rw [Functor.map_comp]` / `rw [Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app]`
  failures — *"Did not find an occurrence of the pattern (?f ≫ ?g) ≫ ?h"* / *"(Adjunction.unit ?adj).app
  ?X ≫ Functor.map …"* — on the `SheafOfModules ≫` seam (defeq-not-syntactic) and on the opaque
  `ofIsRightAdjoint` unit. Resolution = term-mode (`Eq.trans`/`congrArg`/`:=`) for every category-lemma
  step, exactly matching the memory warning. `Functor.map_comp`/`map_id` needed `CategoryTheory.`
  qualification (clash with the lawful-functor homonyms).
- No naked-sorry stubs left as "progress": both `H1inv` (body) and `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`
  (pre-sorry reduction) contain genuine compiling tactic code.

## Secondary / deferred (not attempted, by directive)
- S2 (L690), S4b (L756): gated on full B1-crux closure (residual remains) — correctly skipped.
- S3 (L715), S4a (L740): deferred dual gap. `trivialisation_restrict_compat` (L828): telescope of all 5 squares.

## Cleanup directives NOT done (carry forward)
- The plan's two cheap cleanups (L193 stale "(iter-028 stubs)" header; L519/630 "sorry-free" →
  "sorry-free at this level") — the docstring at L629–631 *does* now say "sorry-free at this level …
  reduced residual `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq`", so that one is partially addressed. Re-flagged in
  recommendations for completeness.

## Verdict on convergence
- This is the 3rd consecutive iter (049 B2-helper, 050 B2-close, 051 B1-helper) where the terminal
  advances by reducing an opaque crux to a named `leftAdjointUniq`/mate-calculus residual. B2 fully
  closed (050). B1-crux now has the SAME shape of residual B2 had — a `leftAdjointUniq`-comparison mate
  identity over a concrete-vs-abstract adjunction bridge. The route is concrete and the blocker named;
  but the count has not dropped this iter. The plan's NEW B1-crux HARD STOP applies next iter: if
  `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` survives a dedicated pass with no advance → effort-break the mate identity
  AND/OR mathlib-analogist cross-domain (abstract `ofIsRightAdjoint` unit ↔ concrete sheafify∘pullback∘forget).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. (No rename, no Mathlib-backed leaf, no completed proof block to override `sync_leanok` on — the
  new helper carries a sorry; H1inv body is sorry-free but transitively rides a sorry so its proof block
  is correctly left unmarked.) `sync_leanok` state: iter 51 ran.

## Coverage debt (for planner)
- NEW helper `sheafPullbackUnit_forget_eq` has no blueprint block — listed in recommendations.md.
- `archon dag-query unmatched` = 106 `lean_aux` nodes (bulk pre-existing debt, planner-deferred to the
  scheduled file-split/coverage phase). Not a regression of this iter.

## Blueprint doctor
- Clean: no orphan chapters, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no new `axiom` declarations.
